name: Service with no workload
description: A Service whose selector does not match any workload pod is dangling. It typically results from a workload being renamed or deleted, or from a typo in the selector or pod labels. Dangling Services consume cluster names and can cause silent routing failures.
remediation: Verify the Service selector matches the labels of an existing workload in the same namespace, or remove the Service if it is no longer needed.
test: Check that every Service with a selector has at least one workload in the same namespace whose pod template labels are a superset of the selector.
